_comment: Wave 5 cleanup Part 2 fixture of record - REAL Get-AutoSensitivityLabelRule AdvancedRule capture from the TEST sandbox (grouped conditions: 4 named groups + 1 empty operator-only group artifact; 10 distinct entries = 7 named SITs + 3 trainable classifiers). The maintainer paste arrived 2 closing brackets short (Format-List copy truncation); grouped.AdvancedRule carries the minimal bracket repair RULED at Part 2 kickoff (pin the 10-name list; the 12-SITs label on the capture was a loose count). malformed.AdvancedRule preserves the AS-PASTED truncated string verbatim - the real-world contract case 3 fixture. Both objects are cmdlet-shaped raw rules consumed by Tests/Collect.Contract.Tests.ps1 read stubs.

grouped.Name: Auto-label grouped health data
grouped.AdvancedRule: {"Version":"1.0","Condition":{"Operator":"And","SubConditions":[{"ConditionName":"ContentContainsSensitiveInformation","Value":[{"Groups":[{"Name":"PII Identifiers","Operator":"Or","Sensitivetypes":[{"Name":"U.S. Social Security Number (SSN)","Id":"a44669fe-0d48-453d-a9b1-2cc83f2cba77","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":75},{"Name":"Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA) Number","Id":"9a5445ad-406e-43eb-8bd7-cac17ab6d0e4","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":85},{"Name":"U.S. Physical Addresses","Id":"44aa44f2-63d1-41df-af0d-970283ac41e2","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":75}]},{"Name":"ICD-9/10 code descriptions","Operator":"Or","Sensitivetypes":[{"Name":"International Classification of Diseases (ICD-9-CM)","Id":"fa3f9c74-ee07-4c52-b5f2-085d6b2c0ec4","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":85},{"Name":"International Classification of Diseases (ICD-10-CM)","Id":"3356946c-6bb7-449b-b253-6ffa419c0ce7","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":85},{"Name":"All Medical Terms And Conditions","Id":"065bdd91-ef07-40d3-b8a4-0aea722eaa49","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":85}]},{"Name":"Names","Operator":"And","Sensitivetypes":[{"Name":"All Full Names","Id":"50b8b56b-4ef8-44c2-a924-03374f5831ce","Mincount":1,"Maxcount":-1,"Maxconfidence":100,"Minconfidence":75}]},{"Name":"Trainable clasifiers","Operator":"Or","Sensitivetypes":[{"Name":"Business - Health care","Id":"dcbada08-65bf-4561-b140-25d8fee4d143","Classifiertype":"MLModel"},{"Name":"Employee Insurance Files","Id":"fa982a9f-9454-4885-a2bf-94a155df2f33","Classifiertype":"MLModel"},{"Name":"Health/Medical Forms","Id":"7cc60f30-9e96-4d51-b26f-3d7a9df56338","Classifiertype":"MLModel"}]},{"Operator":"And"}]}]}]}}
